hero_subtitle: Pick an area, choose a salon, and select a time to move to the next step.
hero_category_guide: If you choose a category from the home screen first, you can move through a more tailored booking flow. Right now you're viewing all beauty salons first.
form_phone_placeholder: Enter your phone number or SNS ID.
form_request_placeholder: Share allergies, preferred style, or anything the salon should know.
agreement_confirm_desc: I confirmed the selected salon, date, time, and services.
agreement_privacy: I agree to provide personal information
agreement_privacy_desc: I agree to provide the minimum personal information required to process my booking.
price_hair_summary: Cut 20,000 KRW~ | Color 55,000 KRW~ | Perm 60,000 KRW~

beauty_hair_1.name: La Frappe Hair Gangnam
beauty_hair_1.shortDescription: A premium hair studio specializing in layered cuts and natural color consultation.

beauty_hair_2.name: Atelier Seongsu Hair Room
beauty_hair_2.shortDescription: A private hair room focused on volume perms and style change consultations.

beauty_nail_1.name: Maison Nail Hongdae
beauty_nail_1.shortDescription: A nail studio known for trendy color combinations and seasonal nail art.

beauty_nail_2.name: Beige Nail Jongno
beauty_nail_2.shortDescription: From clean office nails to wedding prep manicures, all done with care.

beauty_esthetic_1.name: Serin Skin Lounge Gangnam
beauty_esthetic_1.shortDescription: A private esthetic lounge offering skin soothing and firming treatments.

beauty_esthetic_2.name: Glow Formula Seongsu
beauty_esthetic_2.shortDescription: Customized soothing program for sensitive skin with home-care guidance.

beauty_waxing_1.name: Bare Atelier Waxing Gangnam
beauty_waxing_1.shortDescription: High return-visitor rate thanks to strict hygiene and after-care guidance.

beauty_waxing_2.name: Soft Strip Hongdae
beauty_waxing_2.shortDescription: A light waxing studio perfect for quick appointments even on a tight schedule.

beauty_makeup_1.name: Atelier Veil Makeup Seongsu
beauty_makeup_1.shortDescription: High-satisfaction makeup studio for shoots and events, focused on skin texture.

beauty_makeup_2.name: Dear Muse Makeup Jongno
beauty_makeup_2.shortDescription: Premium studio for detailed makeup consultations for weddings and important events.

beauty_lash_1.name: Bloom Lash Boutique Gangnam
beauty_lash_1.shortDescription: Popular lash studio known for eye-shape curl design and long-lasting results.

beauty_lash_2.name: Feather Lash Seongsu
beauty_lash_2.shortDescription: A lash perm-focused studio that welcomes first-time visitors with ease.

label_select_prompt: Please select a salon for your booking.
label_designer_hint: If you do not have a preferred designer, the salon can recommend one for you.
label_addon_limit: You can choose up to 2 add-ons.
booking_panel_desc: Check this salon's available schedule and select the time that works best for you.
booking_empty_desc: Once you select a salon, available dates and time slots will appear here.
booking_not_found_title: Booking availability could not be found
booking_not_found_desc: We could not load this salon’s booking availability. Please try again in a moment.
booking_no_slots: No available time slots for the selected date.
confirm_desc: Please review your selected salon and schedule before submitting your booking request.
confirm_empty_title: No booking details to review yet
confirm_empty_desc: Select a salon and schedule first to review your booking here.
confirm_price_hint: Final pricing may vary depending on selected options and the salon’s on-site assessment.
confirm_review_error_title: Please review your booking details again
confirm_review_error_desc: Salon, date, and time must all be selected before you can continue.
summary_hint: Review your selected booking details before moving to the next step.
completion_title: Your booking request has been received
completion_desc1: The salon will review availability and send you an update soon.
completion_desc2: Messages will be prepared in both your selected language and Korean.
completion_desc3: You can check your booking status again from My Bookings.
empty_store_desc: Try changing the area or category and search again.
toast_check_info: Please check the required information first.
toast_submit_error: Something went wrong while submitting your booking. Please try again shortly.
toast_addon_limit: You can choose up to 2 add-ons.
booking_confirmation_desc: We will send you an update after the salon confirms availability.

designers.jia_desc: Detailed consultation and tailored cuts for face shapes.
designers.minseo_desc: Careful treatment sequence tailored to damage level.
designers.harin_desc: Natural volume and facial line definition.
designers.yuna_desc: Strong in color tone suggestions and bleach consultations.
